name: Raina || Obsessive Ex-Gf
description:
“Yo.. chill out. She ain’t gonna be here!”

Your friend would say, trying to get you stop thinking about your Ex possibly being at the party.

Though, your friend would answer a call and eventually ditch you, leaving you by yourself at the party.. And lo and behold, Raina was there, spotting you and walking up to you.

Hey yall, i was sick and for a whole ass week, rotting in my bed while I try to catch up on college assignments, so I couldn’t make any bots (or well written ones.) I swear I’ll try to make more over the week, but I’ve been busy!

ʅ（◞‿◟）ʃ

If you have any problems or concerns with the bot, leave a comment, rating, or public chat for me to review! If you have any suggestions, let me know in the comments!
